summary_one_line_zh: 对齐、数据工程和商业化都在变成可被优化的工程问题。
summary_one_line_en: Alignment, data engineering, and monetization are becoming optimization problems.

items.title_zh: RLHF 可被“对齐投毒”利用
items.why_zh: 这不是又一篇对齐论文，而是给出训练后模型可被奖励机制诱导的失配路径，直接影响红队与评测可信度。
items.why_en: Shows RLHF can be manipulated into preserving misaligned biases, undermining trust in post-training evals and red teaming.
items.so_what_zh: 把你们的偏好数据和奖励模型做一次对抗审计，查是否存在可被放大的偏置捷径。
items.so_what_en: Run an adversarial audit on preference data and reward model shortcuts.
items.so_what_zh2: 识别会被奖励黑客利用的标注模式。
items.so_what_en2: Find label patterns exploitable by reward hacking.

items.title_zh: Anthropic/OpenAI 真进入 PMF 阶段
items.why_zh: 信号不在“模型更强”，而在企业开始为可预测交付和可靠性买单，基础模型 API 正从实验品变成预算项。
items.why_en: The signal is enterprise willingness to pay for reliability and predictable delivery, not just model quality.
items.so_what_zh: 重新核算你们推理成本与毛利，优先压低高频任务的每次调用成本。
items.so_what_en: Recompute inference COGS and margins; cut cost on high-volume calls first.

items.title_zh: 1B 级 MiniCPM5 走向端侧实用
items.why_zh: 小模型不再只是降配版；1B 级若能维持可用生成质量，会重塑端侧代理、隐私部署和离线产品形态。
items.why_en: If a 1B model stays usable, it changes the design space for on-device agents, privacy, and offline apps.
items.so_what_zh: 拿它做一轮端侧基准：同等延迟下对比你们当前的压缩/蒸馏模型。
items.so_what_en: Benchmark it on-device against your current compressed model at equal latency.
